sections.paragraph: pr.n. Hophra, king of Egypt, cotemporary with Nebuchadnezzar, Jer 44:30. LXX. Οὐαφρῆ (perhaps priest of the sun, Coptic ⲟⲩⲏⲃ ⲫⲣⲏ), called by Manetho, Οὔαφρις; the seventh king of the second Saïtic dynasty; whom Herodotus (ii. 161, 162, 169; iv. 159) and Diodorus (i. 68) call Apries (Ἀπρίης).
